subflow.purpose: Convert valid provisional filter edits into the active Jobs browsing context.
subflow.trigger: The user invokes Apply while filter edits are valid and applying would affect browsing.
subflow.userIntent: Commit the current filter choices and return to results.
visibleSteps: Apply is visible when applying matters.
Apply is enabled only when the edited filters are valid.
Modal closes and results reflect the selected filters.
subflow.expectedResult: The Jobs results experience reflects the applied filters and the modal is closed.
alternateResults: If the edited filters are invalid, Apply remains visible but disabled until the user fixes the problem.
If applying would not change browsing, Apply is not shown as a meaningful action.
edgeCases: User edits then restores values back to the active browsing context.
User creates invalid input after Apply was previously available.
User attempts to apply while a blocking condition is present.
mustNotHappen: Apply must not silently save a reusable filter definition.
Apply must not close the modal without updating visible browsing when it reports success.
Apply must not be hidden merely because the user needs to correct invalid input.

confirmationBaseline.notesMd: Backfilled as the audit baseline for the one-pass UX spec creation/update. This records provenance only; it does not replace UX authority, product confirmation, behavior mappings, or runtime drift ledgers.
